nodes.label: AI as interactive research tool for follow-up questions
nodes.grounding_span: AI lets me follow up with specifics like gender, weight, age, race when asking about symptoms or medication side effects

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and sounding board
nodes.grounding_span: AI is really helpful with brainstorming, helping to steer things in certain directions, and just generally being a sounding board but I like to make final decisions

nodes.label: AI for writing assistance and clarity
nodes.label_negative: AI writing entire notes without human input
nodes.grounding_span: I like writing my own nursing notes and care plans but it is really nice to get help with clarity, wording choice, and other types of suggestions

nodes.label: AI use stigma in workplace
nodes.grounding_span: There's a lot of stigma around AI for various reasons

nodes.label: AI as web-like learning tool revealing unexpected connections
nodes.grounding_span: It's like learning in a web pattern

nodes.label: AI for administrative paperwork reduction
nodes.grounding_span: I love the idea of AI doing all the paperwork so I can focus on patient care

nodes.label: AI as reliable sole source of information
nodes.grounding_span: I hope in the future that we can trust AI to be accurate enough to be a sole source of information

nodes.label: Efficient knowledge acquisition
nodes.grounding_span: In 10 minutes I knew all about the disorder and its treatments

nodes.label: Professional autonomy and final decision-making
nodes.grounding_span: I like to make final decisions

nodes.label: Social acceptance and reduced stigma
nodes.grounding_span: Without the stigma behind AI being a sort of form of cheating

nodes.label: Enthusiasm for AI's interactive research capability
nodes.grounding_span: AI lets me follow up with specifics like gender, weight, age, race when asking about symptoms or medication side effects

nodes.label: Preference for human final decision-making
nodes.grounding_span: I like to make final decisions

nodes.label: Frustration with workplace stigma
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like someone would try to get me in trouble

nodes.label: Optimism about AI reducing paperwork
nodes.grounding_span: I love the idea of AI doing all the paperwork so I can focus on patient care

nodes.label: Hope for future AI reliability as sole source
nodes.grounding_span: I hope in the future that we can trust AI to be accurate enough to be a sole source of information

nodes.label: Web-like associative learning — connecting disparate domains
nodes.grounding_span: It's like learning in a web pattern

nodes.label: Privacy-conscious compartmentalization — separating AI use from identifiable data
nodes.grounding_span: I keep specifics like names out of it for privacy reasons and edit those in after on a secure charting app
